Video.summary: Anything is possible, no matter the tools.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Mind Over Matter

Video.summary: Blake gets a big surprise when he expects to learn a new sport but realizes he'll be decorating a cake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Cake Decorating

Video.summary: Blake runs on blades but can he wield a sword and survive a dual with a master of fencing?
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Fencing

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Fencing
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Fencing
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Fencing

Video.summary: Beauty, grace, and the pros make it look so easy, but Blake learns just how hard the sport of diving can be.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Diving

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Diving
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Diving
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Diving

Video.summary: Ping Pong may be a fun family game, but Blake faces a master who shows him how serious the game can be.

Video.summary: These pros bring a smile to everything they do.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Fresh Fun

Video.summary: They're incredibly talented and the big-city is their playground.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Cityscapes

Video.summary: A waterfall in the city, art made from string, gunpowder, candle wax, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.2

Video.summary: A monument made of dust, an ambidextrous artist, a steampunk inspired creation, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.3

Video.summary: A waterfall in the city, art made from string, gunpowder, candle wax, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.2

Video.summary: A monument made of dust, an ambidextrous artist, a steampunk inspired creation, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.3

Video.summary: A portrait made of coffee stains, a chocolate sculpture, not your average gingerbread cookie, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.4

Video.summary: A humanoid robot transformation, a mountain of cats, a limestone leaf sculpture, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.5

Video.summary: See the possibilities in all of your surroundings.
Video.title: Showcase | New Perspective
